experience.title: Dissertee

skills_and_achievements: Skilled in PCR, RFLP, neurogenetics, immunology, molecular biology, and data analysis. Co-author of review Expert Reviews in Molecular Medicine (Cambridge Univ. Press, 2025) on dengue immunopathogenesis.
